subcodes.first_line: O friends! Know ye the station of the Days of the All-Merciful. This is the Day wherein a single deed surpasseth the deeds of centuries and ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان مقام ایام رحمن را بدانید امروز روزیست که عملی در آن از اعمال قرون و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
